description: Phase 4.1 live lock/unlock validation against disposable fixture
fixture_note: Placeholder files at all 8 protected relative paths plus 4 mutable dirs; no live runtime files affected

tests.action: Apply icacls deny *S-1-1-0:(W,D) to all 8 protected files
Verify lock detection and mutable dir writability
Remove icacls deny ACEs from all 8 protected files
Verify unlock detection — all files should report UNLOCKED

cosmetic_note: Em dash (U+2014) in Write-Host output renders as garbled characters in PowerShell 5.1 subprocess — cosmetic only, does not affect functional behavior
overall_result: PASS — lock, detect, mutable-writable, unlock, detect-unlocked all verified against live icacls execution
checklist_items_resolved: All 8 protected files lockable via Lock-HeliosProtectedFiles
All 8 protected files unlockable via Unlock-HeliosProtectedFiles
Test-HeliosLockStatus reports LOCKED after live lock
Mutable directories remain writable after lock operation
